pages.text: A coffin can be used by $(l:observations/vampirism)Vampires$(/l) to sleep in. They differ from $(item)Beds$(), for they allow the Vampire player to sleep thought the day.$(br)In order to sleep in a Coffin, the player must first open it, by sneak-using it, and then right clicking on it as normal. $(l:artifacts/misc/taglock_kit)Taglock Kits$(/l) work on a Coffin in the same way as they do on beds.

pages.title: Additional Info
pages.text: Sleeping in the Coffin sets the player spawn point to its location, and sleeping through the day on a multiplayer server requires all players to sleep.$(p)A Vampire may sleep in a $(item)Bed$() to skip the night as usual on a multiplayer server.
